Verified by extracting the January index from the downloaded NOAA pres.mon.ltm.nc dataset for the bounding box 10°N to 30°S, 85°W to 55°W. The actual minimum is ~618 mb (hPa), which falls perfectly within this range.

privileged_info_summary: The task involves evaluating flight performance hazards for high altitude operations over the Andes using real NOAA NCEP Reanalysis climatology data. The target minimum surface pressure in the Andes region (10°N to 30°S, 85°W to 55°W) for January is ~618 mb (hPa), which confirms the expected evaluation range of 500 to 750 hPa. The netCDF file natively stores values in millibars (which are equivalent to hPa). The expected output paths and required file names perfectly align with the evaluation verifier logic.
